update.noticeDetailsCannotUpdate: Version %1 is available, but you cannot update at this time.
update.noticeDetailsCannotUpdatePlatform: Your current Joomla version is not compatible with this release.
update.noticeDetailsCannotUpdatePhp: Your current PHP version is not compatible with this release.

inputError.onlyLettersAndNumbers: No space or symbol, only letters and numbers
inputError.invalidCssSelector: Invalid CSS selector: there is an error in the CSS selector you typed, your browser does not accept it.

backendComm.errorViewDetailsInConsole: More details can be found in the browser Javascript console.
backendComm.errorViewLogFilesOnServer: More details on the server error log files.

ui.expandHelp: Show help information for this element.
ui.connectionRecovered: We can reach your server again after an interruption!
ui.connectionLostDetails: Either your server is down, your Joomla! session has expired, or maybe you logged-out from another tab of this browser.
ui.connectionLostDetailsPrompt: If you logged-out, please update the page with the button below and log back in to resume work.
ui.connectionLostResume: We can now connect to your server normally, please reload this page to continue:
ui.suggestAutoClear: Notifications can be automatically closed. Go to Configuration | System | Auto-clear notifications to enable.

url.genericFullUrlCaption: Enter the full URL. Must start with https:// or http://.

lists.selectAnItem: Please select an item from the list first.
lists.selectOnlyOneItem: Please only select one item from the list.

crud.fixErrors: Please fix entry errors before saving!
crud.confirmDeleteItems: Please confirm you want to delete %1 item(s)
crud.confirmDeleteAllItems: Please confirm you want to delete all item(s) from this list.

helpSystem.cannotLoad: Sorry, it seems the help server is down or we don't have internet access to load this help text. Maybe try again a bit later?

imageGrid.titleSelectSingle: ...or select one of the images found on this page (recommended)

rules.dateRangeWarning: Currently outside of this date range, rule not running for now.

pageEdit.title: Details of
pageEdit.canonicalCaption: Override the default canonical URL for this page.
pageEdit.canonicalSpec: Should start with a / or include the full domain - eg https://example.com/some-page
pageEdit.pageImagePreview: Preview of the image currently selected for this page
pageEdit.urlCaption: Enter the address of the page on your website you want 4SEO to analyze and possibly add to the database.
pageEdit.enterUrl: Enter the URL of a page on your site.
pageEdit.creatingRefreshingHelp: If this page has not already been analyzed, 4SEO will fetch it and analyze it. Else, it will refresh its data about this page.
pageEdit.startProcessingCaption: Click this button to analyze the page. 4SEO will check if it knows it already, and either update or fetch the page data to add it to the database.
pageEdit.pageTitleCaption: Use this field to override current page title. The current page title is shown in the Search Engines Preview.
pageEdit.descriptionCaption: Use this field to override current page meta description. The current page meta description is shown in the Search Engines Preview (truncated as Google would normally do).

robots.robotsCaption: Robots tags tells complying search engines if they can index or follow links on the page. NB: Google considers noindex,follow the same as noindex,nofollow if found on a page for a long time.

indexNow.errorInvalidUrl: No or invalid URL to submit to IndexNow provided.
indexNow.help:
IndexNow is a mechanism used by several search engines to be informed of pages that have just been modified on your site. Note that Google does not use IndexNow.

You can submit a page to IndexNow just after you made significant changes to it. All participating search engines will be informed and may come back to load the page and update their data.

This may increase the speed at which your website changes are indexed by search engines.

Do not submit existing pages that have not just been modified. IndexNow recommends to use your sitemap for these pages and 4SEO already handles your sitemap automatically.
indexNow.submissionFailure: Submission to IndexNow incomplete or failed
indexNow.submissionError202: Pending validation of secret key (202). Likely your site is not online, or access is blocked.
indexNow.submissionError400: Invalid request, some part of the submission are invalid (400).
indexNow.submissionError403: Invalid secret key: missing secret key file, or secret key not matching (403).
indexNow.submissionError422: Host not allowed by secret key (422).
indexNow.submissionError429: Too many requests, need to wait a bit (429).

meta.customImage: Select an image to represent this page. Select one of the images taken from the page (highly recommended). Or choose one not on the page, with the Select Image button.
meta.imageUrlSpec: Should start with a / or include the full domain - eg https://example.com/my-image.jpg

socialNetworks.imageSpec: Select a large image, at least %1 pixels wide and larger if possible.
socialNetworks.fbDebuggerCaption: Click the button to load your page and test it with the Facebook debugger. Do this each time you change your page, Facebook will not update its data automatically. Opens in new tab.
socialNetworks.twitterTesterCaption: Click the button to go to the X (Twitter) tester. Opens in new tab.
socialNetworks.ogpTitle: Custom title for social networks sharing
socialNetworks.ogpDescription: Custom description for social networks sharing
socialNetworks.tcardsTitle: Custom title for sharing on X (Twitter)
socialNetworks.tcardsDescription: Custom description for sharing on X (Twitter)

sd.widerImage: Select a large image, at least %1 pixels wide and larger if possible.
sd.widerAndTallerImage: Select a large image, at least %1 x %2 pixels and larger if possible.
sd.widerTallerPixelsImage: Select a large image, at least %1 x %2 pixels, and with more than %3 pixels in total.

crawl.crawlOneSuccess: This page has been analyzed successfully.
crawl.crawlError: There was some error analyzing this page.

confirmer.withPasswordConfirmationMessage: This is an important operation, you will also be prompted for your password for a final confirmation.
